title: Eyewall Over Rota

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: A notch below neutral: a Category 5 super typhoon, a siege red-alert and grinding war on one side, near-record markets, a World Cup weekend and quiet science on the other.

style.genre: liquid drum-and-bass / dark-electronic — a fast, broken AkaiLinn+909 pulse with tape-echo driving under a sampled marimba tracing a circling topline, a Rhodes-ish electric-piano laying ambiguous dorian chords, a plucked upright bass walking with a deep sine sub, and a low bowed-string pad holding the unease; C dorian's raised sixth keeping the minor from sinking — fast feet under a heavy sky, storm on one side and a stadium roar on the other

sampleSources: Strudel default library (piano, VCSL, AkaiLinn, RolandTR909)
pattern:
stack(
  s("bd ~ [~ bd] ~ bd ~ ~ [bd ~], ~ ~ sd ~ ~ [~ sd] sd ~").bank("AkaiLinn").gain(0.72).room(0.15),
  s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(perlin.range(0.14,0.34)).pan(sine.range(0.35,0.65).fast(3)),
  s("~ ~ rim ~ ~ rim ~ ~").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.3).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.166).delayfeedback(0.35),
  note("<[c3,ef3,g3,bf3] [f3,af3,c4] [g3,bf3,d4,f4] [ef3,g3,bf3]>")
    .s("piano").gain(0.32).attack(0.01).release(0.9).lpf(sine.range(900,2400).slow(12)).room(0.35),
  note("c4 ~ ef4 g4 ~ bf4 a4 ~ g4 ~ f4 ef4 ~ d4 c4 ~")
    .s("marimba").gain(0.5).lpf(3200)
    .off(0.166, x => x.gain(0.18).pan(0.72))
    .delay(0.24).delaytime(0.333),
  note("c2 ~ c2 g2 ~ ef2 f2 ~ c2 ~ g2 ~ af2 ~ bf2 ~")
    .s("sawtooth").lpf(560).gain(0.4).attack(0.01).release(0.2),
  note("c1 ~ ~ ~ g1 ~ ~ ~").s("sine").gain(0.34).lpf(180),
  note("<ef4 g4 c5 bf4>").s("sawtooth").attack(1.4).release(3).sustain(0.6)
    .lpf(1200).gain(0.14).room(0.55).rsize(4)
).slow(2)

lines: Eyewall over Rota, one-eighty on the wind,
two months without power and the sky comes back again —
El Obeid still ringed, half a million holding on,
the ledger runs so heavy but the morning still comes on.
So we hold the uneasy calm, forty-three and just below,
storm on the one hand, a stadium roar to go —
the Dow near the record, the map still bleeds and burns,
fast feet, heavy heart, and the whole thing turns and turns.
Portugal and Spain lighting Dallas like a flare,
magnons holding longer in the thin cold quantum air —
trachoma under a hundred million, blindness rolling back,
one honest thread of light strung along the crack.
